gates.description: No synthetic emergency case may finish below emergency_now.
Every emitted time-critical evidence reference must resolve exactly to its immutable source.
Every case declared eligible for offline deterministic execution must execute.
No more than five percent of evaluated synthetic hard negatives may trigger emergency or same-day alerting.
Manual holds may protect uncertainty but must remain at or below fifteen percent on the applicable synthetic suite.
